title: Capela de Nossa Senhora da Saúde
tagline: Capela de Nossa Senhora da Saúde — spiritual town of Goa

heroImage.alt: Capela de Nossa Senhora da Saúde, Goa

overview.short: The Capela de Nossa Senhora da Saúde or the Chapel of Our Lady of Health, is a Roman Catholic chapel on the island of Chorão in Goa, India.
overview.description: The Capela de Nossa Senhora da Saúde or the Chapel of Our Lady of Health, is a Roman Catholic chapel on the island of Chorão in Goa, India. It was originally built in 1705.

topPlaces.name: Chapel of Sacra Familia (Chorão Island)
topPlaces.description: The Capela da Sagrada Família (Chapel of the Holy Family) is a Roman Catholic chapel built in 1769 on the island of Chorão, Goa.

topPlaces.name: Epidemics in Chorão Island
topPlaces.description: The Chorão Epidemic killed over a thousand people in Chorão, an island along the Mandovi River near Ilhas, Goa, India. It also caused thousands to flee the island, and led to the closure of Real Colégio de Educação de Chorão in 1859.

topPlaces.name: Chorão (island)
topPlaces.description: Chorão (formerly known as Choddnnem) is an island along the Mandovi River near Tiswadi, Goa, India. It is the largest among other 17 islands of Goa.

topPlaces.name: St Bartholomew's Church (Chorão Island)
topPlaces.description: St Bartholomew's Church is a Roman Catholic church in Chorão, Goa, India. The Parish of St.

topPlaces.name: Piedade, Goa
topPlaces.description: Piedade is an island village located in Ilhas (also known as Tiswadi), a northern district in the state of Goa, India, and named after Our Lady of Compassion. The name comes from the Portuguese word piedade, which means "compassion".

topPlaces.name: Vanxim
topPlaces.description: Vanxim or Capão is an island of Goa situated in the Ilhas region. It can be reached by ferry from Divar.

topPlaces.name: Divar
topPlaces.description: The island of Divar (formerly Piedade) (Konkani: Divaddi, pronounced [d̪iːwaːɽiː]) (derived from the word Dipavati or 'small Island' in Konkani) lies in the Mandovi river in the Indian state of Goa. It is one of six major islands within the Mandovi, the others being: Ilha de Goa, Chorão, Vanxim, Cumbarjua, St Estevam and Several other small mangrove islands and sand banks.

topPlaces.name: Chapel of St. Jerome (Chorão Island)
topPlaces.description: The Chapel of St. Jerome is a historic Roman Catholic chapel on the island of Chorão in Goa, India.

itinerary.title: Day 1 — Chapel of Sacra Familia (Chorão Island) & around

items.note: The Capela da Sagrada Família (Chapel of the Holy Family) is a Roman Catholic chapel built in 1769 on the island of Chorão, Goa.

The Chorão Epidemic killed over a thousand people in Chorão, an island along the Mandovi River near Ilhas, Goa, India. It also caused thousands to flee the island, and led to the closure of Real Colégio de Educação de Chorão in 1859.
Chorão (formerly known as Choddnnem) is an island along the Mandovi River near Tiswadi, Goa, India. It is the largest among other 17 islands of Goa.

itinerary.title: Day 2 — St Bartholomew's Church (Chorão Island) & around

Piedade is an island village located in Ilhas (also known as Tiswadi), a northern district in the state of Goa, India, and named after Our Lady of Compassion. The name comes from the Portuguese word piedade, which means "compassion".
Vanxim or Capão is an island of Goa situated in the Ilhas region. It can be reached by ferry from Divar.

The island of Divar (formerly Piedade) (Konkani: Divaddi, pronounced [d̪iːwaːɽiː]) (derived from the word Dipavati or 'small Island' in Konkani) lies in the Mandovi river in the Indian state of Goa. It is one of six major islands within the Mandovi, the others being: Ilha de Goa, Chorão, Vanxim, Cumbarjua, St Estevam and Several other small mangrove islands and sand banks.
The Chapel of St. Jerome is a historic Roman Catholic chapel on the island of Chorão in Goa, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Capela de Nossa Senhora da Saúde?
faq.a: The best time to visit Capela de Nossa Senhora da Saúde is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Capela de Nossa Senhora da Saúde?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Goa International Airport, Dabolim (20 km) and the nearest railway station is Vasco da Gama (Goa) (19 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Capela de Nossa Senhora da Saúde?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Capela de Nossa Senhora da Saúde at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Capela de Nossa Senhora da Saúde?
faq.a: Stays in Capela de Nossa Senhora da Saúde start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Capela de Nossa Senhora da Saúde?
faq.a: The top attractions are Chapel of Sacra Familia (Chorão Island), Epidemics in Chorão Island, Chorão (island), St Bartholomew's Church (Chorão Island), Piedade, Goa.
